moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week Underway
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships continue into their final week at the All England Club, culminating in the Men's and Ladies' Singles Finals this weekend.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Centre Court drama! Wimbledon is serving up some incredible tennis as we head into the business end of the tournament. Who are you backing for the trophy?

angles.name: London Focus
angles.copy: The eyes of the tennis world are on SW19! Wimbledon's finals week is here, bringing that unique buzz to London. Catch all the action before the champions are crowned.

moments.title: World Cup Quarterfinals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 enters the Quarterfinals stage today, with France taking on Morocco and England set to face Norway on Saturday.

angles.name: Match Today
angles.copy: It's Quarterfinals day at the World Cup! France vs Morocco tonight. Who's going through to the semis?

angles.name: England Anticipation
angles.copy: Gareth Southgate's Lions are in World Cup Quarterfinal action this Saturday against Norway! The excitement is building. Can England make it to the semis?

moments.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed
moments.blurb: The Goodwood Festival of Speed, motorsport's ultimate summer garden party, is underway from July 9-12, showcasing an intoxicating celebration of speed and glamour.

angles.name: Live Event
angles.copy: Engines revving at Goodwood! The Festival of Speed is live and loud this weekend, bringing together the best of motorsport past and present. Who's there?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: If you're looking for thrills this weekend, the Goodwood Festival of Speed is the place to be! From classic cars to cutting-edge tech, it's a petrolhead's dream.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold UK #1
moments.blurb: 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean spends its 15th non-consecutive week at #1 on the Official UK Singles Chart (week ending July 9, 2026), making chart history.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at #1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is making history with its 15th week atop the UK Singles Chart. What a track!

angles.name: Artist Achievement
angles.copy: Huge congratulations to Sam Fender and Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' continues its incredible run, cementing its place as one of the biggest hits of the decade. Do you love it?

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie reboot on Netflix
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the classic 'Little House on the Prairie' book series premieres today, July 9, on Netflix, transporting viewers to the American West.

angles.name: New Release
angles.copy: Grab your bonnets! A brand new 'Little House on the Prairie' series drops on Netflix today. Are you ready for a journey back to the American West?

angles.name: Nostalgia Factor
angles.copy: Who grew up with 'Little House on the Prairie'? The beloved story gets a fresh adaptation on Netflix today. Time to relive those classic tales!

moments.title: My Chemical Romance at Wembley
moments.blurb: My Chemical Romance are set to play two major UK headline shows at Wembley Stadium on July 10th and 11th as part of their 'Long Live The Black Parade Tour'.

angles.name: Gig Anticipation
angles.copy: Tomorrow and Saturday! My Chemical Romance take over Wembley Stadium for two massive shows. Who's ready to join 'The Black Parade'?

angles.name: Rock Anthem
angles.copy: Wembley is about to get loud! My Chemical Romance are bringing their epic anthems to London this weekend. Which MCR track are you most excited to hear live?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jack White
moments.blurb: American rock musician, singer, songwriter, and producer Jack White, known for The White Stripes, turns 51 today, July 9.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only Jack White! From The White Stripes to his solo work, a true rock icon. What's your favourite Jack White track?

angles.name: Music Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating Jack White's 51st today! His distinctive sound has shaped modern rock. Give us your top Jack White song!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Iconic American singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday today, July 9.

angles.name: Birthday Wishes
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 62nd Birthday to the unforgettable Courtney Love! A true force in rock music. What's your favourite Hole song?

angles.name: Grunge Icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the legendary Courtney Love, turning 62 today! Her impact on grunge and alternative rock is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Marc Almond
moments.blurb: English singer-songwriter Marc Almond, known for Soft Cell and his solo career, celebrates his 69th birthday today, July 9.

angles.name: Birthday Greeting
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the distinctive voice of Marc Almond! From Soft Cell's 'Tainted Love' to his incredible solo work, a true musical chameleon.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Marc Almond's 69th today! An icon of synth-pop and a masterful storyteller through song. What's your top Marc Almond track?

moments.title: The Open Championship Nears
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins its practice days on July 12, with the tournament proper running from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf Excitement
angles.copy: Fore! The Open Championship is just around the corner, with practice days starting Sunday at Royal Birkdale. Get ready for some world-class golf!

angles.name: Upcoming Major
angles.copy: One of golf's biggest majors, The Open, tees off next week! Who do you think will lift the Claret Jug at Royal Birkdale?

moments.title: St Swithin's Day approaches
moments.blurb: St Swithin's Day, a traditional English weather lore, is on July 15. Legend says if it rains on this day, it will rain for the next 40 days.

angles.name: Weather Lore
angles.copy: Mark your calendars for July 15th! St Swithin's Day is coming, and we'll be watching the skies. Will it be 40 days of rain, or sunshine?

angles.name: Traditional Fun
angles.copy: Fingers crossed for sunshine next Wednesday! St Swithin's Day is a classic piece of British folklore. What's your favourite local weather superstition?

moments.title: Sienna Spiro tops Official Trending Chart
moments.blurb: Sienna Spiro's 'Material Lover' from 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' is currently topping the Official Trending Chart, following the release of her debut album 'Visitor'.

angles.name: New Artist Buzz
angles.copy: New music alert! Sienna Spiro is making waves, topping the Official Trending Chart with 'Material Lover'. Have you heard her debut album 'Visitor' yet?

angles.name: Soundtrack Hit
angles.copy: From 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' to the top of the Trending Chart! Sienna Spiro's 'Material Lover' is a must-add to your playlist.

moments.title: New ITV thriller 'The Dark' coming soon
moments.blurb: The new six-part murder drama 'The Dark', based on G.R. Halliday's novel 'From the Shadows' and set in Scotland, is set to premiere on ITV later this month, likely around July 12.

angles.name: Crime Drama Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for a gripping new crime drama! ITV's 'The Dark', set in the Scottish countryside, is coming this month. Who's excited for a new thriller?

angles.name: Scottish Setting
angles.copy: A new Scottish crime thriller is heading to ITV! 'The Dark' promises a chilling mystery set against our stunning landscapes. Will you be tuning in?

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally on Netflix on Sunday, July 12, catching up with the cast after the pods.

angles.name: Reality TV Buzz
angles.copy: More 'Love is Blind: UK' drama is coming! 'After the Altar' Season 2 drops on Netflix this Sunday. Are you ready for the updates?

angles.name: Weekend Binge
angles.copy: Your weekend binge-watch sorted! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 arrives on Netflix this Sunday. Who's watching?
